title: FabricaeXtras
description: A small addon for Fabricae Ex Nihilo, for now adds a flint crook and flint hammer, this will be used in my upcoming modpack!
body:
![Logo For The mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iUYylUUY/images/a5d65650af3960c9d8603f07b901f8e54d4afec7.png) ##
Hammers and Crooks to aid you!
This mod adds some extras that I think should have been in the [Fabricae Ex Nihilo](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabricae-ex-nihilo 'Redirect'), the fabricae ex nihilo adds hammers and crooks but I think there could be more crooks and hammers! | Crooks | Hammers| |---|:------:| | Flint | Flint | ###
This mod will be used in one of my upcoming modpacks!
Versions: - 1.18.2 DONE - 1.19.2 In Progress - 1.20.1 In Progress # Other Projects!
